description: Intel Core i7 14700KF 14th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i7 14700KF 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i7 14700KF 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.113,000. This unlocked CPU offers 20 cores (8 Performance + 12 Efficient) and 28 threads with boost clock speeds up to 5.7 GHz, delivering excellent performance for gaming and demanding tasks, and requires a discrete GPU since it has no integrated graphics.
